title: alisma obtusifolium
intro: Alisma obtusifolium, also known as the American water plantain or narrowleaf water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the water plantain family. The medicinal properties of Alisma obtusifolium include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Alisma obtusifolium include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of water retention, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve kidney function. Alisma obtusifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as hypertension, edema, and urinary tract infections.
